thewar.recruiter.shout.1: Oi! You there! Yes, you! I need hands, skilled and steady!
thewar.recruiter.shout.2: We're in need of armor, strong and ready! The war's not waiting, and neither are we! If you've got the craft in your blood, the forge needs you now!
thewar.recruiter.shout.3: Steel your nerves and your hearts! We're building for the fight of our lives—get to the forge, and do your part!
thewar.recruiter.shout.4: The need's great, and the pay's fair!
